info.description: Reviewed PDP ingredient and allergen disclosure for a specific Medusa SKU.

Sku.description: Medusa variant SKU this disclosure applies to. Leave blank only when the disclosure applies to every variant on the product.

Ingredients.description: Customer-facing ingredient list, reviewed against the source label.

Directions.description: Optional heating, cooking, or handling instructions from the source label.

SourceLabelFile.description: Relative LabelMatrix source file used for audit/review.

ReviewStatus.description: Only approved disclosures should render on the storefront PDP.

VerifiedAt.description: Timestamp when this disclosure was last approved for customer display.
